requirement_topic.en: Grid voltage and frequency — nominal system voltage
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压与频率——额定系统电压
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓與頻率——額定系統電壓

summary.en: Tuvalu operates a 240/415 V (single/three-phase), 50 Hz grid inherited from UK/IEC conventions. TEC requires BESS power conversion systems (PCS) to be rated and configured for 240/415 V operation. China's domestic grid is 220/380 V 50 Hz — the nominal voltage is different even though both are 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 图瓦卢采用继承自英国/IEC惯例的240/415V（单/三相）、50Hz电网。TEC要求BESS储能变流器（PCS）按240/415V运行额定并配置。中国国内电网为220/380V 50Hz——尽管均为50Hz，但额定电压不同。
summary.zht: 圖瓦盧採用繼承自英國/IEC慣例的240/415V（單/三相）、50Hz電網。TEC要求BESS儲能變流器（PCS）按240/415V運行額定並配置。中國國內電網為220/380V 50Hz——儘管均為50Hz，但額定電壓不同。

summary.en: China standard grid voltage is 220/380 V 50 Hz per GB/T 12325 and GB/T 15945. Chinese BESS PCS units are typically designed and tested for 220/380 V operation. A 240/415 V variant or transformer stage is required for Tuvalu deployment.
summary.zh: 中国标准电网电压为220/380V 50Hz，依据GB/T 12325和GB/T 15945。中国BESS储能变流器通常按220/380V运行设计和测试。在图瓦卢部署需提供240/415V变型或加设变压器级。
summary.zht: 中國標準電網電壓為220/380V 50Hz，依據GB/T 12325和GB/T 15945。中國BESS儲能變流器通常按220/380V運行設計和測試。在圖瓦盧部署需提供240/415V變型或加設變壓器級。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 12325-2008 (Power quality — deviation of supply voltage)

gap.en: VOLTAGE GAP: Tuvalu 240/415 V vs China 220/380 V. Both are 50 Hz but nominal voltage differs by approximately 9%. PCS firmware, protection settings, transformer ratios, and nameplate ratings must all be reconfigured or redesigned for 240/415 V. This is not a simple firmware change — it affects hardware selection, insulation ratings, and type-test certificates.
gap.zh: 电压差距：图瓦卢240/415V对比中国220/380V。两者均为50Hz，但额定电压相差约9%。储能变流器固件、保护定值、变压器变比及铭牌额定值均须重新配置或重新设计以适应240/415V。这不仅是简单的固件更改——还涉及硬件选型、绝缘等级和型式试验证书。
gap.zht: 電壓差距：圖瓦盧240/415V對比中國220/380V。兩者均為50Hz，但額定電壓相差約9%。儲能變流器固件、保護定值、變壓器變比及銘牌額定值均須重新配置或重新設計以適應240/415V。這不僅是簡單的固件更改——還涉及硬件選型、絕緣等級和型式試驗證書。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard Chinese BESS PCS units rated for 220/380 V cannot be directly connected to the Tuvalu 240/415 V grid without hardware modification, re-rating, or an intermediate transformer. A 240/415 V-rated and TEC-approved PCS variant must be supplied. Voltage gap must be closed before any other compliance pathway is relevant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 额定220/380V的标准中国BESS储能变流器无法在不经硬件改造、重新额定或加设中间变压器的情况下直接接入图瓦卢240/415V电网。须提供额定240/415V且经TEC批准的储能变流器变型。在解决电压差距之前，其他任何合规路径均不相关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 額定220/380V的標準中國BESS儲能變流器無法在不經硬體改造、重新額定或加設中間變壓器的情況下直接接入圖瓦盧240/415V電網。須提供額定240/415V且經TEC批准的儲能變流器變型。在解決電壓差距之前，其他任何合規路徑均不相關。

requirement_topic.en: Grid-connection technical requirements — IEC 62933 system compliance
requirement_topic.zh: 并网技术要求——IEC 62933系统合规
requirement_topic.zht: 併網技術要求——IEC 62933系統合規

summary.en: TEC and DoE reference IEC 62933 series (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) for BESS grid-connection technical requirements, including power quality, protection coordination, anti-islanding, and system-level safety. Project specifications for utility-scale installations such as the donor-funded Tuvalu solar-BESS projects require IEC 62933 compliance evidence.
summary.zh: TEC和DoE参照IEC 62933系列（电化学储能系统）制定BESS并网技术要求，涵盖电能质量、保护协调、防孤岛及系统级安全。捐助方资助的图瓦卢太阳能+BESS等公用规模安装的项目规格要求提供IEC 62933合规证据。
summary.zht: TEC和DoE參照IEC 62933系列（電化學儲能系統）制定BESS併網技術要求，涵蓋電能質量、保護協調、防孤島及系統級安全。捐助方資助的圖瓦盧太陽能+BESS等公用規模安裝的項目規格要求提供IEC 62933合規證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 (Safety requirements for grid-integrated EES systems)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 36558-2022 (BESS grid-connection technical requirements) and GB/T 34131-2017 (BESS for power stations) as the domestic grid-connection baseline. These address similar technical parameters but are structured differently from IEC 62933 and are not accepted as equivalent by DoE or TEC without IEC mapping evidence.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 36558-2022（储能系统接入电网技术规定）和GB/T 34131-2017（电化学储能电站运行维护规程）作为国内并网基准。这些标准涉及类似技术参数，但结构与IEC 62933不同，未经IEC对照证据不被DoE或TEC接受为等效标准。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 36558-2022（儲能系統接入電網技術規定）和GB/T 34131-2017（電化學儲能電站運行維護規程）作為國內併網基準。這些標準涉及類似技術參數，但結構與IEC 62933不同，未經IEC對照證據不被DoE或TEC接受為等效標準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2017 (Electrochemical energy storage for power stations)

gap.en: GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131 are not accepted substitutes for IEC 62933 in DoE/TEC project review. Exporters must provide IEC 62933 series test reports or third-party compliance evidence. Additionally, all IEC 62933 parameters must be validated at 240/415 V 50 Hz — not at China's 220/380 V — requiring re-testing or engineering analysis.
gap.zh: GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131在DoE/TEC项目审查中不被接受为IEC 62933的替代标准。出口商须提供IEC 62933系列测试报告或第三方合规证据。此外，所有IEC 62933参数须在240/415V 50Hz下验证——而非中国的220/380V——需要重新测试或工程分析。
gap.zht: GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131在DoE/TEC項目審查中不被接受為IEC 62933的替代標準。出口商須提供IEC 62933系列測試報告或第三方合規證據。此外，所有IEC 62933參數須在240/415V 50Hz下驗證——而非中國的220/380V——需要重新測試或工程分析。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for utility-scale projects — DoE and TEC requirement
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36558 mandatory domestically; not equivalent to IEC 62933

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131 grid-connection documentation is not accepted by DoE or TEC as a substitute for IEC 62933 compliance evidence. IEC 62933 series test reports from an accredited third-party laboratory, validated at 240/415 V 50 Hz, are required for project approval. An IEC 62933 vs GB/T 36558 gap analysis may support the application but does not replace test evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131并网文件不被DoE或TEC接受为IEC 62933合规证据的替代。项目审批须提供经认可第三方实验室出具的IEC 62933系列测试报告，且须在240/415V 50Hz下验证。IEC 62933与GB/T 36558的差距分析可作为申请的支持材料，但不能替代测试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131併網文件不被DoE或TEC接受為IEC 62933合規證據的替代。項目審批須提供經認可第三方實驗室出具的IEC 62933系列測試報告，且須在240/415V 50Hz下驗證。IEC 62933與GB/T 36558的差距分析可作為申請的支持材料，但不能替代測試證據。

requirement_topic.en: Coastal environmental derating — salt-mist, heat, and humidity
requirement_topic.zh: 沿海环境降额——盐雾、高温与高湿
requirement_topic.zht: 沿海環境降額——鹽霧、高溫與高濕

summary.en: Tuvalu is a tropical Pacific island nation with a high-humidity, salt-mist coastal environment year-round. DoE and project owners require BESS enclosures, inverters, and battery modules to be rated and derated for salt-mist exposure (IEC 60068-2-52 or equivalent), high ambient temperatures (typically 30–35°C average with peaks), and sustained relative humidity above 80%. IEC 62933-3-1 environmental planning requirements apply.
summary.zh: 图瓦卢是太平洋热带岛国，全年处于高湿度、盐雾沿海环境。DoE和项目业主要求BESS外壳、逆变器及电池模组按盐雾暴露（IEC 60068-2-52或同等标准）、高环境温度（通常平均30–35°C，峰值更高）和持续相对湿度超过80%进行额定和降额。IEC 62933-3-1环境规划要求适用。
summary.zht: 圖瓦盧是太平洋熱帶島國，全年處於高濕度、鹽霧沿海環境。DoE和項目業主要求BESS外殼、逆變器及電池模組按鹽霧暴露（IEC 60068-2-52或同等標準）、高環境溫度（通常平均30–35°C，峰值更高）和持續相對濕度超過80%進行額定和降額。IEC 62933-3-1環境規劃要求適用。

summary.en: Chinese BESS products are typically tested and rated for inland or mild-coastal environments per GB/T 36276 and GB/T 2423 environmental test standards. Salt-mist ratings are not always included in standard GB certification packages. IP ratings may be to IP54 or IP55, which may be insufficient for direct outdoor coastal exposure in Tuvalu conditions.
summary.zh: 中国BESS产品通常按GB/T 36276和GB/T 2423环境测试标准针对内陆或轻度沿海环境进行测试和额定。标准GB认证包中不一定包含盐雾等级。IP等级可能为IP54或IP55，对于图瓦卢条件下的室外沿海直接暴露可能不足。
summary.zht: 中國BESS產品通常按GB/T 36276和GB/T 2423環境測試標準針對內陸或輕度沿海環境進行測試和額定。標準GB認證包中不一定包含鹽霧等級。IP等級可能為IP54或IP55，對於圖瓦盧條件下的室外沿海直接暴露可能不足。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage)

gap.en: Chinese BESS products may not carry salt-mist certification to IEC 60068-2-52 cyclic severity levels appropriate for sustained Pacific coastal exposure. IP ratings and thermal management must be re-evaluated for Tuvalu ambient conditions. Derating curves for capacity and power output at elevated temperatures must be supplied. This is an engineering gap requiring product-specific documentation — not resolved by general GB certification.
gap.zh: 中国BESS产品可能未取得适用于太平洋沿海持续暴露的IEC 60068-2-52循环严酷等级盐雾认证。IP等级和热管理须针对图瓦卢环境条件重新评估。须提供高温下容量和功率输出的降额曲线。这是一个需要产品专项文件的工程差距——通用GB认证无法解决。
gap.zht: 中國BESS產品可能未取得適用於太平洋沿海持續暴露的IEC 60068-2-52循環嚴酷等級鹽霧認證。IP等級和熱管理須針對圖瓦盧環境條件重新評估。須提供高溫下容量和功率輸出的降額曲線。這是一個需要產品專項文件的工程差距——通用GB認證無法解決。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DoE project approval and TEC connection requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Partial — GB/T 2423.17 salt-mist testing available but not always certified

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS products must demonstrate IEC 60068-2-52 salt-mist certification at a severity appropriate for sustained Pacific coastal exposure, IP65 or higher enclosure rating for outdoor installation, and product-specific thermal derating curves for Tuvalu ambient conditions. Standard GB/T 36276 certification packages typically do not include these — additional testing or documentation is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国BESS产品须证明具备适用于太平洋沿海持续暴露严酷等级的IEC 60068-2-52盐雾认证、室外安装IP65或更高外壳等级，以及针对图瓦卢环境条件的产品专项热降额曲线。标准GB/T 36276认证包通常不包含上述内容——须进行额外测试或补充文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國BESS產品須證明具備適用於太平洋沿海持續暴露嚴酷等級的IEC 60068-2-52鹽霧認證、室外安裝IP65或更高外殼等級，以及針對圖瓦盧環境條件的產品專項熱降額曲線。標準GB/T 36276認證包通常不包含上述內容——須進行額外測試或補充文件。
